playlist_strategy: A progressive 10-track journey designed for a complete running session. It begins with a steady warm-up, builds into a driving rhythm for the core run, peaks during high-intensity intervals and the final sprint, and concludes with a euphoric cool-down.

tracks.title: Morning Stride
tracks.youtube_title: Morning Stride 🌅 Best Running Warm Up Music | Steady Pace
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: sunrise orange, soft pink, deep blue
tracks.style_prompt: chillwave, tropical house instrumental, 115 BPM, A Minor, relaxed but steady four-on-the-floor groove, deep round bass, soft punchy kick, atmospheric synth pads, catchy marimba-like synth hook in the first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality, slowly building arrangement
tracks.image_prompt: cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up, attractive female runner stretching outdoors at sunrise, fresh morning dew, warm sunlight hitting her face, focused expression, sportswear, shallow depth of field, vibrant sunrise orange and deep blue colors, high contrast
tracks.youtube_description: Start your run right with this perfect warm-up track! 🌅 Morning Stride sets a steady pace to get your muscles loose and your mind focused. Let the tropical chillwave vibes guide your first mile. 🏃‍♀️✨ #RunningMusic #WarmUp #Jogging #MorningRun

tracks.youtube_description: Find your perfect running rhythm with this deep house banger! 🏃‍♂️ Designed for 5K runners finding their pocket, this steady 122 BPM track keeps your feet moving and your heart pumping effortlessly. 💪 Let's go! #RunningMotivation #DeepHouse #CardioWorkout

tracks.youtube_description: Push through those middle miles with Oxygen Intake! 🌬️ A relentless 135 BPM Tech House track designed to keep your cadence sharp and your energy high. Lock in, breathe deep, and crush this run. 🚀🔥 #RunningCadence #135BPM #TechHouseWorkout

tracks.youtube_description: Time for intervals! 💔 Heartbreaker Interval brings explosive drops and massive 808s to fuel your high-intensity sprints. When the beat drops, you go ALL OUT. Perfect for HIIT and track workouts. ⏱️😤 #HIIT #SprintMusic #ExtremeWorkout

tracks.image_prompt: cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up, exhausted but determined female runner catching her second wind, sweat dripping, rainy forest path, resilient and unstoppable expression, emerald green foliage, silver rain, rich black shadows, high contrast cinematic lighting
tracks.youtube_description: Hit the wall? Smash through it with Second Wind! 🌪️ This high-octane 174 BPM Liquid Drum & Bass track is pure kinetic energy. Perfect for finding that hidden reserve of power when the run gets tough. Never quit! 🔋🏃‍♀️ #DrumAndBass #RunningMotivation #SecondWind

tracks.youtube_description: You did it. 😌 Let the Endorphin Rush wash over you. This 120 BPM Melodic House track is perfect for slowing down your pace, dropping your heart rate, and celebrating a great run. Soak in that post-workout high! 🌅👟 #CooldownMusic #MelodicHouse #PostRun
